personal.name: Priyank Chavda
personal.title: Full Stack MERN Developer & Generative AI Engineer
personal.shortBio: Highly innovative MERN Stack Developer specializing in AI-powered applications, Generative AI integrations, and scalable full-stack systems.
personal.currentFocus: Building AI-first MERN applications using Large Language Models (LLMs).

highlights: Architected and deployed multiple e-commerce stores (Clothing, Beauty) from end-to-end, establishing robust foundational infrastructure for scalability.
Optimized e-commerce architecture and streamlined user interfaces to significantly enhance the shopping experience and conversion rates.
Directed comprehensive domain management, including DNS configuration and hosting setup.
Managed accurate posting of payments for a US medical billing company over an 8-month period, ensuring high data integrity and adherence to strict compliance protocols.

projects.title: Gym AI Personal Trainer
projects.description: An intelligent fitness tracking application featuring a contextual AI coach that analyzes user progress to dynamically suggest personalized workout routines.
features: Dynamic workout routine suggestion guided by contextual AI.
Secure user authentication with Google OAuth.
Manual exercise logging & bulk routine uploads via CSV parsing.
Interactive dashboard displaying exercise progress trends.
projects.challengesSolved: Solved CSV parsing edge cases for user-defined workout schemas by adding automatic format detection, and lowered token consumption in the AI model using summarized workout histories.
projects.architecture: MVC Architecture. Express.js REST API layer queries MongoDB for exercises, feeds summaries to Gemini model via Server-Side API, and returns beautiful insights to React chart interfaces using Tailwind.

projects.title: AI Plant Analysis Tool
projects.description: A full-stack AI application that processes and analyzes plant health, diseases, and growth data, leveraging an external API to generate actionable gardening insights.
features: Responsive MERN interface for seamless file/image uploads.
Dynamic gardening suggestions and problem diagnosis responses.
Image identification using prompt-driven vision analysis.
projects.challengesSolved: Optimized base64 image encoding size before passing payloads to Gemini API, achieving rapid response times even on slow 3G cellular connections.
projects.architecture: Full-stack image handler pipelines. Uploads from React interface are sent as base64 to Node.js backend proxy, which invokes Gemini 3.5's multimodal vision engine, streaming responses securely back to front-end.

projects.title: AI-Powered Portfolio Assistant
projects.description: An interactive, context-aware chatbot trained on Priyank's exact custom background, resume, and skills to answer developer recruitment queries efficiently.
features: Injected local portfolio system context and resume data schema JSON.
Typing indicators, sugggested questions, and recruiter chat memory.
Subtle floating widget and fullscreen mode with modern chat bubbles.
projects.challengesSolved: Implemented an anti-hallucination system prompt that strictly bound answers to structured background JSON, suppressing general knowledge responses.
projects.architecture: Express endpoint accepts thread messages, fetches system context, passes historical conversations to Gemini 3.5 chat session, and feeds responses back in Markdown format.

projects.title: Full-Stack Blog Platform
projects.description: A complete content management system (CMS) with secure user authentication, dynamic routing, and efficient database integration.
features: Full CRUD operations via secure RESTful APIs.
Secure user authentication and route guards.
Robust MongoDB data relations for posts and authors.
projects.challengesSolved: Designed optimized database indexing for search queries and configured CORS middleware to securely isolation API endpoints.
projects.architecture: Strict Express MVC pattern. Controllers manage post models with schemas, route handlers apply verifyToken middleware for authentication, and the React frontend presents rich post interfaces.

projects.title: MixTape Music Streaming App
projects.description: A high-performance music streaming application integrating third-party audio APIs for seamless data processing and playback.
features: Sleek and responsive custom player interface.
Dynamic search and queue management.
Seamless audio streaming Integration.
projects.challengesSolved: Resolved complex audio state synchronization issues between list component items and the global player layout by using React Context.
projects.architecture: Vite-packaged single page application querying rapid Express server proxies, which cache remote music audio stream chunk links to prevent playback delays.

projects.title: Gold & Silver Live Price Tracker
projects.description: A real-time precious metals price tracking application utilizing external APIs and high-performance charts.
features: Real-time gold and silver pricing feeds.
Responsive, minimal chart visualizations.
Automatic price threshold alerts.
projects.challengesSolved: Connected background cron tasks to refresh cache intervals, ensuring users saw instantaneous load states with cached prices.
projects.architecture: Django views pull metal prices from financial API providers, index them in cache memory, and render clean layouts showing price history.

projects.title: Expense Tracker
projects.description: A responsive financial management tool that enables users to efficiently monitor, track, and categorize personal finances, improving budgeting accuracy.
features: Easy expense and income tracking.
Categorized visualization dashboards.
Budget goals and alerts.
projects.challengesSolved: Simplified database queries via Django ORM and aggregate annotation, resulting in an 80% decrease in computation overhead for monthly summaries.
projects.architecture: Standard Python web server leveraging SQLITE relational tables, rendering components and charts mapped using Bootstrap tables and dashboards.

certifications: Full Stack Web Development with MERN & GenAI (90 Hours)
